steps.title: Find unexpected recognition
steps.content: The claim says Du Bois felt an intuitive and sometimes unexpected sense of cultural recognition when hearing Black folk songs. The best quotation must show both unfamiliarity and an immediate feeling that the songs belonged to him culturally.

steps.title: Match unknown and mine
steps.content: Choice A praises the music's national importance, Choice C discusses authenticity and preservation, and Choice D describes historical development. The remaining quote says the songs came to him unknown yet were immediately recognized as 'of me and of mine.' The answer is B.
